title: Domain Name Transfer Agreement
description: Agreement transferring domain name ownership, registrar credentials, and associated branding.
whatsCovered: Domain URL names and registrar details
Purchase price and escrow transaction structures
Delivery of domain authorization EPP codes
Representations that domain has no active UDRP disputes
Transition of email records and host names
whenToUse: Use this contract when selling or buying high-value internet domains, securing domain transfer codes (EPP keys).

clauses.heading: DOMAIN NAME TRANSFER AGREEMENT
clauses.body: This agreement or policy (the "Agreement") is executed as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {party_a_name}, residing/located at {party_a_address} ("First Party"), and {party_b_name}, residing/located at {party_b_address} ("Second Party").

clauses.heading: 1. Core Framework
clauses.body: This agreement establishes the legal rights, bylaws, transfers, waivers, or consent structures for the Domain Name Transfer Agreement. The parties agree to adhere to the terms and declarations set out below.

clauses.heading: 2. EPP Key Deliveries
clauses.body: Seller shall sell domain {domain_url} for the purchase price of {domain_price}. Seller shall deliver registrar EPP authorization codes.

clauses.heading: General Legal Terms
clauses.body: This document constitutes the entire understanding between the parties. Any amendments must be made in writing and executed by both parties.

clauses.heading: Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed and interpreted under the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: Can I customize this legal template?
faq.answer: Yes, you can edit this template using the online editor, and add custom schedules or exhibits.

faq.question: Is this agreement binding?
faq.answer: Yes, once signed by all parties, it becomes a legally binding contract under state laws.
